<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ja">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>くま組 | 弾き語りシンガー</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Zen+Maru+Gothic:wght@500;700;900&family=Zen+Kaku+Gothic+New:wght@400;500;700&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --cream:#FFF8ED;
    --cream-deep:#FBF0DA;
    --cocoa:#4A342A;
    --cocoa-soft:#7A5C4C;
    --honey:#F2A93B;
    --honey-deep:#DE8F1E;
    --raspberry:#E85D75;
    --moss:#8FAE7D;
    --line:rgba(74,52,42,0.12);
    --radius-lg:28px;
    --radius-sm:16px;
  }

  *{box-sizing:border-box;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  body{
    margin:0;
    background:var(--cream);
    color:var(--cocoa);
    font-family:'Zen Kaku Gothic New','Noto Sans JP',sans-serif;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
    overflow-x:hidden;
  }
  h1,h2,h3,.display{
    font-family:'Zen Maru Gothic',sans-serif;
    margin:0;
    letter-spacing:0.01em;
  }
  .mono{
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
    letter-spacing:0.04em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
  }
  a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none;}
  img{max-width:100%;display:block;}
  section{position:relative;}
  .wrap{
    max-width:1040px;
    margin:0 auto;
    padding:0 24px;
  }

  /* Paw texture background */
  .paw-field{
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    pointer-events:none;
    opacity:0.5;
    z-index:0;
  }
  .paw{
    position:absolute;
    color:var(--honey);
    opacity:0.16;
  }

  /* Header */
  header{
    position:sticky;
    top:0;
    z-index:50;
    background:rgba(255,248,237,0.85);
    backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .nav-inner{
    max-width:1040px;
    margin:0 auto;
    padding:16px 24px;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
  }
  .logo{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    font-size:22px;
    font-weight:700;
    color:var(--cocoa);
  }
  .logo-mark{
    width:34px;height:34px;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--honey);
    display:grid;place-items:center;
    font-size:18px;
    flex-shrink:0;
  }
  nav ul{
    list-style:none;
    display:flex;
    gap:28px;
    margin:0;padding:0;
  }
  nav a{
    font-size:14px;
    font-weight:500;
    padding:6px 2px;
    border-bottom:2px solid transparent;
    transition:border-color .2s ease, color .2s ease;
  }
  nav a:hover, nav a:focus-visible{
    border-color:var(--raspberry);
    color:var(--raspberry);
    outline:none;
  }
  .nav-toggle{display:none;margin-left:auto;}

  /* Hero */
  .hero{
    padding:96px 0 60px;
    text-align:center;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .eyebrow{
    display:inline-flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    font-size:12px;
    color:var(--cocoa-soft);
    background:var(--cream-deep);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    padding:6px 16px;
    border-radius:999px;
    margin-bottom:28px;
  }
  .hero h1{
    font-size:clamp(28px, 6vw, 68px);
    font-weight:900;
    line-height:1.05;
    color:var(--cocoa);
    white-space:nowrap;
  }
  .hero h1 span{
    color:var(--honey-deep);
    position:relative;
    display:inline-block;
  }
  .hero p.tagline{
    max-width:520px;
    margin:26px auto 0;
    font-size:17px;
    line-height:1.9;
    color:var(--cocoa-soft);
  }
  .hero-cta{
    display:flex;
    gap:14px;
    justify-content:center;
    margin-top:38px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .btn{
    display:inline-flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    padding:14px 30px;
    border-radius:999px;
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:15px;
    transition:transform .2s ease, box-shadow .2s ease;
    border:2px solid transparent;
  }
  .btn-primary{
    background:var(--raspberry);
    color:#fff;
    box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(232,93,117,0.35);
  }
  .btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 12px 26px rgba(232,93,117,0.42);}
  .btn-ghost{
    background:transparent;
    border-color:var(--cocoa);
    color:var(--cocoa);
  }
  .btn-ghost:hover{background:var(--cocoa);color:var(--cream);transform:translateY(-2px);}

  /* Honey drip divider */
  .drip{
    display:block;
    width:100%;
    height:64px;
    margin-top:-1px;
  }

  /* Section headings */
  .section-head{
    text-align:center;
    max-width:560px;
    margin:0 auto 52px;
  }
  .section-head .mono{
    font-size:12px;
    color:var(--raspberry);
    display:block;
    margin-bottom:10px;
  }
  .section-head h2{
    font-size:clamp(30px,4vw,42px);
    font-weight:700;
  }
  .section-head p{
    margin-top:14px;
    color:var(--cocoa-soft);
    font-size:15px;
    line-height:1.8;
  }

  /* Profile */
  #profile{background:var(--honey);padding:80px 0 96px;}
  .profile-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:280px 1fr;
    gap:56px;
    align-items:center;
  }
  .profile-photo{
    aspect-ratio:1;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--cream);
    border:6px solid var(--cocoa);
    display:grid;
    place-items:center;
    position:relative;
    font-size:64px;
  }
  .profile-photo::before, .profile-photo::after{
    content:'';
    position:absolute;
    top:-14px;
    width:56px;height:56px;
    background:var(--cream);
    border:6px solid var(--cocoa);
    border-radius:50%;
  }
  .profile-photo::before{left:14px;}
  .profile-photo::after{right:14px;}
  .profile-text .mono{font-size:12px;color:var(--cocoa);opacity:0.7;}
  .profile-text h3{
    font-size:clamp(26px,3vw,34px);
    margin:10px 0 18px;
  }
  .profile-text p{
    font-size:15.5px;
    line-height:1.95;
    color:var(--cocoa);
    max-width:520px;
  }
  .profile-tags{
    display:flex;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    gap:10px;
    margin-top:22px;
  }
  .tag{
    background:var(--cream);
    border-radius:999px;
    padding:8px 18px;
    font-size:13px;
    font-weight:500;
    border:1px solid rgba(74,52,42,0.15);
  }

  /* Music */
  #music{padding:96px 0;}
  .featured-album{
    max-width:800px;
    margin:0 auto 56px;
    background:var(--cocoa);
    border-radius:var(--radius-lg);
    padding:20px;
  }
  .featured-album-embed{
    aspect-ratio:16/9;
    border-radius:var(--radius-sm);
    overflow:hidden;
    background:#000;
  }
  .featured-album-embed iframe{
    width:100%;
    height:100%;
    display:block;
    border:0;
  }
  .featured-album-caption{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:18px;
    text-align:left;
    padding:20px 8px 4px;
  }
  .featured-album-cover{
    width:76px;
    height:76px;
    border-radius:14px;
    object-fit:cover;
    flex-shrink:0;
    border:2px solid var(--honey);
  }
  .featured-album-text .mono{
    font-size:11px;
    color:var(--honey);
  }
  .featured-album-text h3{
    font-family:'Zen Maru Gothic';
    color:var(--cream);
    font-size:18px;
    font-weight:700;
    margin-top:8px;
  }
  .music-toolbar{
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    align-items:center;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    gap:12px;
    max-width:1040px;
    margin:0 auto 32px;
    padding:0 4px;
  }
  .music-count{
    font-size:12px;
    color:var(--cocoa-soft);
  }
  .music-search{
    font-family:inherit;
    font-size:13px;
    padding:9px 16px;
    border-radius:999px;
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    background:var(--cream-deep);
    color:var(--cocoa);
    width:200px;
    max-width:100%;
  }
  .music-search:focus{outline:2px solid var(--raspberry);outline-offset:1px;}
  .music-grid{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:14px;
    max-width:760px;
    margin:0 auto;
  }
  .track-card{
    background:var(--cream-deep);
    border-radius:var(--radius-lg);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .track-toggle{
    width:100%;
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:16px;
    padding:16px 20px;
    background:none;
    border:none;
    cursor:pointer;
    font-family:inherit;
    text-align:left;
  }
  .track-toggle:hover{background:rgba(242,169,59,0.14);}
  .track-num{
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono';
    font-size:13px;
    color:var(--raspberry);
    font-weight:500;
    flex-shrink:0;
    width:24px;
  }
  .track-title-text{
    flex:1;
    font-size:15px;
    font-weight:500;
    color:var(--cocoa);
  }
  .track-chevron{
    color:var(--cocoa-soft);
    font-size:14px;
    transition:transform .25s ease;
    flex-shrink:0;
  }
  .track-card.open .track-chevron{transform:rotate(180deg);}
  .track-panel{
    max-height:0;
    overflow:hidden;
    transition:max-height .35s ease;
  }
  .track-card.open .track-panel{
    max-height:600px;
  }
  .track-embed{
    aspect-ratio:16/9;
    background:#1b1310;
    margin:0 20px 20px;
    border-radius:var(--radius-sm);
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .track-embed video{
    width:100%;
    height:100%;
    object-fit:contain;
    background:#000;
  }
  .music-note{
    max-width:760px;
    margin:32px auto 0;
    font-size:12.5px;
    color:var(--cocoa-soft);
    text-align:center;
    line-height:1.8;
  }

  /* Live */
  #live{background:var(--cocoa);color:var(--cream);padding:96px 0;}
  #live .section-head p{color:rgba(255,248,237,0.7);}
  #live .section-head .mono{color:var(--honey);}
  .schedule{
    max-width:720px;
    margin:0 auto;
    border-top:1px solid rgba(255,248,237,0.18);
  }
  .schedule-row{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:120px 1fr auto;
    gap:20px;
    align-items:center;
    padding:22px 4px;
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,248,237,0.18);
  }
  .schedule-date{
    font-family:'JetBrains Mono';
    font-size:14px;
    color:var(--honey);
  }
  .schedule-row h4{font-size:17px;font-weight:500;font-family:'Zen Kaku Gothic New';}
  .schedule-row p{margin:4px 0 0;font-size:13px;color:rgba(255,248,237,0.6);}
  .schedule-status{
    font-size:12px;
    padding:6px 14px;
    border-radius:999px;
    border:1px solid rgba(255,248,237,0.35);
    white-space:nowrap;
  }
  .schedule-empty{
    text-align:center;
    padding:40px 20px;
    color:rgba(255,248,237,0.55);
    font-size:14px;
  }

  /* Contact */
  #contact{padding:96px 0 110px;}
  .contact-box{
    max-width:600px;
    margin:0 auto;
    background:var(--cream-deep);
    border-radius:var(--radius-lg);
    padding:44px;
    border:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .field{margin-bottom:20px;}
  .field label{
    display:block;
    font-size:13px;
    font-weight:700;
    margin-bottom:8px;
  }
  .field input, .field textarea{
    width:100%;
    padding:13px 16px;
    border-radius:var(--radius-sm);
    border:1px solid rgba(74,52,42,0.2);
    background:var(--cream);
    font-family:inherit;
    font-size:14px;
    color:var(--cocoa);
  }
  .field input:focus, .field textarea:focus{
    outline:2px solid var(--raspberry);
    outline-offset:1px;
  }
  .field textarea{resize:vertical;min-height:110px;}
  .contact-note{
    font-size:12px;
    color:var(--cocoa-soft);
    margin-top:14px;
    text-align:center;
  }

  /* Footer */
  footer{
    padding:48px 0 40px;
    text-align:center;
    border-top:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .sns{
    display:flex;
    justify-content:center;
    gap:16px;
    margin-bottom:18px;
  }
  .sns a{
    width:42px;height:42px;
    border-radius:50%;
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    display:grid;place-items:center;
    font-size:16px;
    transition:background .2s ease, color .2s ease;
  }
  .sns a:hover{background:var(--raspberry);color:#fff;border-color:var(--raspberry);}
  footer p{font-size:12px;color:var(--cocoa-soft);}

  /* Reveal animation */
  .reveal{
    opacity:0;
    transform:translateY(24px);
    transition:opacity .7s ease, transform .7s ease;
  }
  .reveal.in{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}

  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    .reveal{opacity:1;transform:none;transition:none;}
    html{scroll-behavior:auto;}
  }

  @media (max-width: 860px){
    .profile-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;text-align:center;}
    .profile-photo{margin:0 auto;width:220px;}
    .profile-text p{margin:0 auto;}
    .profile-tags{justify-content:center;}
  }
  @media (max-width: 720px){
    nav ul{
      position:fixed;
      top:64px;left:0;right:0;
      flex-direction:column;
      background:var(--cream);
      padding:20px 24px;
      gap:6px;
      border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
      transform:translateY(-130%);
      transition:transform .3s ease;
    }
    nav ul.open{transform:translateY(0);}
    nav a{display:block;padding:12px 4px;}
    .nav-toggle{
      display:block;
      background:none;border:none;
      font-size:22px;color:var(--cocoa);
      cursor:pointer;
    }
    .schedule-row{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:8px;text-align:left;}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header>
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <div class="logo"><span class="logo-mark">🐻</span>くま組</div>
    <button class="nav-toggle" aria-label="メニューを開く" aria-expanded="false" id="navToggle">☰</button>
    <nav>
      <ul id="navList">
        <li><a href="#profile">プロフィール</a></li>
        <li><a href="#music">楽曲</a></li>
        <li><a href="#live">ライブ</a></li>
        <li><a href="#contact">お問い合わせ</a></li>
      </ul>
    </nav>
  </div>
</header>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="paw-field" id="pawField"></div>
  <div class="wrap" style="position:relative;z-index:1;">
    <span class="eyebrow mono">🍯 弾き語りシンガー</span>
    <h1>はちみつ色の<span>うた</span>をとどけます</h1>
    <p class="tagline">くま組です。<br>なんでもない毎日にひとさじの甘さを。<br>ゆっくり聴いてもらえたら嬉しいです。</p>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a href="#music" class="btn btn-primary">🎵 楽曲を聴く</a>
      <a href="#live" class="btn btn-ghost">📅 ライブ予定</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <svg class="drip" viewBox="0 0 1200 60" preserveAspectRatio="none">
    <path d="M0,0 L1200,0 L1200,20 C1150,20 1130,50 1080,50 C1030,50 1010,22 960,22 C910,22 890,52 840,52 C790,52 770,18 720,18 C670,18 650,48 600,48 C550,48 530,20 480,20 C430,20 410,50 360,50 C310,50 290,22 240,22 C190,22 170,52 120,52 C70,52 50,20 0,20 Z" fill="var(--cream-deep)"/>
  </svg>
</section>

<section id="profile">
  <div class="wrap profile-grid reveal">
    <div class="profile-photo" style="background-image:url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');background-size:cover;background-position:center;" aria-hidden="true"></div>
    <div class="profile-text">
      <span class="mono">Profile</span>
      <h3>くま組</h3>
      <p>
        路上とSNSを中心に活動している弾き語りシンガー。やさしい声と素朴なギターの音で、日常の小さな幸せや、ちょっとした寂しさをそっと歌にしています。
      </p>
      <div class="profile-tags">
        <span class="tag">🎸 弾き語り</span>
        <span class="tag">🎤 シンガーソングライター</span>
        <span class="tag">🍯 かわいい系ポップ</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="music">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head reveal">
      <span class="mono">Music</span>
      <h2>楽曲</h2>
      <p>くま組の楽曲をまとめて聴けます。</p>
    </div>
    <div class="featured-album reveal">
      <div class="featured-album-embed">
        <iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/0cRo-ZWmGDI" title="くま組 1stアルバム クロスフェード" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
      </div>
      <div class="featured-album-caption">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="くま組 1stアルバム ジャケット" class="featured-album-cover">
        <div class="featured-album-text">
          <span class="mono">1st Album</span>
          <h3>くま組 1stアルバム クロスフェード(全23曲)</h3>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="music-toolbar">
      <span class="music-count">全27曲</span>
      <input type="text" class="music-search" id="musicSearch" placeholder="曲名で検索" aria-label="曲名で検索">
    </div>
    <div class="music-grid" id="trackList">
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">01</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">くま組、集合！</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/01_くま組_集合_.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">02</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">11時のこんにちは</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/02_11時のこんにちは.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">03</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">11時のぴよすきー！</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/03_11時のぴよすきー_.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">04</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">ぴよすきー！くまさん！</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/04_ぴよすきー_くまさん_.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">05</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">11時のわっしょい</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/05_11時のわっしょい.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">06</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">23時の挨拶</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/06_23時の挨拶.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">07</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">真夜中のこんにちは</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/07_真夜中のこんにちは.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">08</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">難儀な乙女</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/08_難儀な乙女.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">09</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">あなたのぬくもりだけ</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/09_あなたのぬくもりだけ.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">10</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">ぴよ校 全力ファイト</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/10_ぴよ校_全力ファイト.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">11</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">シャンパンタワーと愚民ども</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/11_シャンパンタワーと愚民ども.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">12</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">ノイキャンは敵</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/12_ノイキャンは敵.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">13</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">こんにちはの先</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/13_こんにちはの先.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">14</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">4センチの約束</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/14_4センチの約束.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">15</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">知らないふりのこんにちは</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/15_知らないふりのこんにちは.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">16</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">くまの告白</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/16_くまの告白.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">17</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">硬くなる光</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/17_硬くなる光.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">18</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">心のアチーブメント</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/18_心のアチーブメント.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">19</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">おとぼけくま</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/19_おとぼけくま.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">20</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">紅茶とふくよかな殿方</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/20_紅茶とふくよかな殿方.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">21</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">みんな大好きトドたろう</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/21_みんな大好きトドたろう.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">22</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">6絶トドたろう</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/22_6絶トドたろう.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">23</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">ララオスぺろぺろまん</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/23_ララオスぺろぺろまん.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">24</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">おしめぇダイナマイト</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/24_おしめぇダイナマイト.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">25</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">めろんれおにす</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/25_めろんれおにす.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">26</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">めろんれおにす2</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/26_めろんれおにす2.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="track-card reveal">
        <button class="track-toggle" aria-expanded="false" type="button">
          <span class="track-num">27</span>
          <span class="track-title-text">決戦！すけべピクチャー</span>
          <span class="track-chevron" aria-hidden="true">▾</span>
        </button>
        <div class="track-panel">
          <div class="track-embed">
            <video controls preload="metadata" playsinline src="videos/27_決戦_すけべピクチャー.mp4"></video>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <p class="music-note">※ 曲名をタップすると動画プレーヤーが開きます。もう一度タップで閉じます。</p>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="live">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head reveal">
      <span class="mono">Live</span>
      <h2>ライブ・イベント</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="schedule reveal">
      <div class="schedule-empty">
        🐾 現在、予定されているライブ情報はありません。決まり次第こちらでお知らせします。
      </div>
      <!--
        予定が決まったら下記のような行を追加してください:
        <div class="schedule-row">
          <div class="schedule-date">2026.08.15</div>
          <div>
            <h4>会場名・イベント名</h4>
            <p>開場19:00 / 開演19:30・前売¥2,000</p>
          </div>
          <div class="schedule-status">受付中</div>
        </div>
      -->
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="contact">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="section-head reveal">
      <span class="mono">Contact</span>
      <h2>お問い合わせ</h2>
      <p>ライブ出演のご依頼、取材、その他ご連絡はこちらから。</p>
    </div>
    <form class="contact-box reveal" onsubmit="event.preventDefault(); alert('送信フォームの動作には別途設定が必要です。');">
      <div class="field">
        <label for="name">お名前</label>
        <input type="text" id="name" name="name" placeholder="山田 花子" required>
      </div>
      <div class="field">
        <label for="email">メールアドレス</label>
        <input type="email" id="email" name="email" placeholder="you@example.com" required>
      </div>
      <div class="field">
        <label for="message">メッセージ</label>
        <textarea id="message" name="message" placeholder="お問い合わせ内容をご記入ください" required></textarea>
      </div>
      <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary" style="width:100%;justify-content:center;">送信する</button>
    </form>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="sns">
    <a href="#" aria-label="X">𝕏</a>
    <a href="#" aria-label="Instagram">📷</a>
    <a href="#" aria-label="YouTube">▶</a>
  </div>
  <p>© 2026 くま組. All rights reserved.</p>
</footer>

<script>
  // Mobile nav toggle
  const navToggle = document.getElementById('navToggle');
  const navList = document.getElementById('navList');
  navToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const isOpen = navList.classList.toggle('open');
    navToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', isOpen);
  });
  navList.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(a => a.addEventListener('click', () => {
    navList.classList.remove('open');
    navToggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
  }));

  // Scroll reveal
  const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  if ('IntersectionObserver' in window) {
    const io = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      entries.forEach(entry => {
        if (entry.isIntersecting) {
          entry.target.classList.add('in');
          io.unobserve(entry.target);
        }
      });
    }, { threshold: 0.15 });
    reveals.forEach(el => io.observe(el));
  } else {
    reveals.forEach(el => el.classList.add('in'));
  }

  // Music search filter
  const musicSearch = document.getElementById('musicSearch');
  if (musicSearch) {
    musicSearch.addEventListener('input', () => {
      const q = musicSearch.value.trim().toLowerCase();
      document.querySelectorAll('#trackList .track-card').forEach(card => {
        const title = card.querySelector('.track-title-text').textContent.toLowerCase();
        card.style.display = title.includes(q) ? '' : 'none';
      });
    });
  }

  // Track card tap-to-expand
  document.querySelectorAll('.track-toggle').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const card = btn.closest('.track-card');
      const isOpen = card.classList.contains('open');
      const video = card.querySelector('video');
      if (isOpen) {
        card.classList.remove('open');
        btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        if (video) video.pause();
      } else {
        card.classList.add('open');
        btn.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
      }
    });
  });

  // Subtle paw print field in hero
  const pawField = document.getElementById('pawField');
  const pawSymbol = '🐾';
  const positions = [
    {top:'10%', left:'6%', size:'28px', rotate:'-18deg'},
    {top:'70%', left:'10%', size:'22px', rotate:'12deg'},
    {top:'20%', left:'88%', size:'32px', rotate:'22deg'},
    {top:'78%', left:'85%', size:'24px', rotate:'-10deg'},
    {top:'45%', left:'4%', size:'18px', rotate:'8deg'},
    {top:'40%', left:'93%', size:'20px', rotate:'-14deg'},
  ];
  positions.forEach(p => {
    const el = document.createElement('span');
    el.className = 'paw';
    el.textContent = pawSymbol;
    el.style.top = p.top;
    el.style.left = p.left;
    el.style.fontSize = p.size;
    el.style.transform = `rotate(${p.rotate})`;
    pawField.appendChild(el);
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>
